title: Mademoiselle Fifi
writer: Guy de Maupassant, Josef Mischel, Peter Ruric
actors: Simone Simon, John Emery, Kurt Kreuger
plot: During Franco-Prussian War, a French laundress shares coach with arrogant passengers. When Prussian officer stops them, social hierarchies crumble as character integrity faces scrutiny amidst adversity.
